Project: bottom-sheet

Summary:
bottom-sheet is a React Native library for performant bottom sheets with Reanimated and Gesture Handler.

Primary behaviors:
- snap points accept pixels, percentages, "content" sizing, and measured anchors
- spring animation with velocity projection for natural snapping
- rubber-band overscroll at top and bottom edges
- dismissal by swipe-down or backdrop tap, configurable per sheet
- when dismissible=false, sheet rubber-bands at its floor instead of dismissing
- detached mode floats the sheet above the bottom edge with configurable padding
- detached sheets can morph into fullscreen with live corner-radius interpolation
- collapsedHeight creates a persistent peek floor for maps-style sheets
- BottomSheetScrollView handles scroll-to-drag handoff automatically
- backdrop opacity scales between floor and ceiling heights
- backdrop can pass through touches or close on tap

Install:
- npm install bottom-sheet react-native-gesture-handler react-native-reanimated react-native-safe-area-context
- consumer app must already have the normal setup required by gesture-handler, reanimated, and safe-area-context

Main component:
- BottomSheet

Main props:
- snapPoints: array of snap point definitions (pixels, percentages, "content", anchor points)
- initialSnapIndex: which snap point to open at (default 0)
- open: controlled open state
- defaultOpen: initial open state for uncontrolled usage (default true)
- allowFullScreen: adds full available height as extra top snap point
- dismissible: enables swipe-down and backdrop-tap dismiss (default true)
- collapsedHeight: persistent floor snap point for peek states
- detached: floats sheet above bottom edge with rounded corners on all sides
- detachedPadding: padding around detached sheet (number or { bottom, horizontal, left, right, top, vertical })
- cornerRadius: border radius for sheet corners (default 28)
- fullScreenCornerRadius: corner radius at fullscreen height, interpolated during drag
- dragRegion: "sheet" (entire surface draggable) or "handle" (only handle area)
- backdropOpacity: maximum backdrop opacity (default 0.34)
- backdropPressBehavior: "close" or "none" (default "close")
- backdropColor: backdrop color (default "#000000")
- backdropStyle: additional backdrop style
- handleVisible: show/hide drag handle (default true)
- handleColor: handle indicator color
- handleStyle: additional handle area style
- sheetStyle: style for sheet container
- contentContainerStyle: style for content wrapper
- applyContentInset: add bottom safe-area padding to content (default true)
- contentBottomInset: extra bottom inset on top of safe area (default 0)
- topInset: top inset limiting maximum height (default 0)
- style: style for root overlay container
- onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void
- onDismiss: () => void
- onSnapChange: (index: number, height: number) => void

Ref methods (BottomSheetRef):
- present(): open at initialSnapIndex
- dismiss(): close with spring animation
- expand(): snap to highest configured point
- snapToIndex(index): snap to specific index

Snap point types:
- number: absolute height in points
- "${number}%": percentage of available height
- "content": measured natural content height
- BottomSheetAnchorPoint: measured from BottomSheetAnchor child layout via createBottomSheetAnchor

Anchor snap points:
- createBottomSheetAnchor(key, { offset? }): creates an anchor point definition
- BottomSheetAnchor: marker View wrapper placed in sheet content, name must match key
- snap height = anchor bottom edge + offset
- anchors are measured in an off-screen container for correct layout

Scrollable content:
- BottomSheetScrollView: drop-in ScrollView replacement with drag handoff
- sheet drags until ceiling, then inner scroll activates
- pulling down from scroll offset zero hands gesture back to sheet
- useBottomSheetInsets(): returns { bottom } for manual padding inside scroll views

Detached mode:
- detached=true floats sheet with padding and four-corner radius
- combine with allowFullScreen for card-to-fullscreen morph
- corner radius, margins, and shadow interpolate during morph

Collapsed peek:
- collapsedHeight prepends a floor snap point
- combine with dismissible=false and backdropOpacity=0 for maps-style persistent peek

Behavior rules:
- snap target is chosen by nearest-snap with velocity projection
- dismiss triggers when projected height < 50% of floor or velocity exceeds threshold
- backdrop opacity interpolates: below floor fades toward zero, above floor scales from 58% to 100%
- controlled mode requires open prop and onOpenChange handler
- uncontrolled mode uses defaultOpen and manages state internally

Minimal example:
```tsx
import { BottomSheet } from "@bobberz/bottom-sheet";

<BottomSheet
  snapPoints={["content", "72%"]}
  allowFullScreen
  initialSnapIndex={0}
>
  <YourContent />
</BottomSheet>
```

Anchor example:
```tsx
import { BottomSheet, BottomSheetAnchor, createBottomSheetAnchor } from "@bobberz/bottom-sheet";

const summaryAnchor = createBottomSheetAnchor("summary", { offset: 18 });
const detailAnchor = createBottomSheetAnchor("detail", { offset: 18 });

<BottomSheet snapPoints={[summaryAnchor, detailAnchor]} allowFullScreen>
  <BottomSheetAnchor name="summary">
    <SummarySection />
  </BottomSheetAnchor>
  <BottomSheetAnchor name="detail">
    <DetailSection />
  </BottomSheetAnchor>
</BottomSheet>
```

Scrollable example:
```tsx
import { BottomSheet, BottomSheetScrollView, useBottomSheetInsets } from "@bobberz/bottom-sheet";

function Content() {
  const insets = useBottomSheetInsets();
  return (
    <BottomSheetScrollView contentContainerStyle={{ paddingBottom: insets.bottom + 20 }}>
      <LongContent />
    </BottomSheetScrollView>
  );
}

<BottomSheet snapPoints={["48%", "82%"]} allowFullScreen dragRegion="sheet" applyContentInset={false}>
  <Content />
</BottomSheet>
```

Public exports:
- BottomSheet
- BottomSheetAnchor
- BottomSheetScrollView
- createBottomSheetAnchor
- useBottomSheetInsets
- BottomSheetAnchorPoint (type)
- BottomSheetAnchorProps (type)
- BottomSheetDetachedPadding (type)
- BottomSheetInsets (type)
- BottomSheetProps (type)
- BottomSheetRef (type)
- BottomSheetSnapPoint (type)
- BottomSheetScrollViewProps (type)

Performance guidance:
- gesture math runs on UI thread via Reanimated worklets
- anchor positions are measured in an off-screen container to avoid layout thrashing
- anchor registration is debounced to batch rapid layout changes
- prefer pixel or percentage snap points when heights are known
- keep children stable across renders
- use sheetStyle for background instead of extra wrapper views
- set applyContentInset=false when using BottomSheetScrollView and handle padding via useBottomSheetInsets

Reference:
- human documentation: ./DOCUMENTATION.md
- repository demo app: ./example/src/demo/demo-screen.tsx
- scenario definitions: ./example/src/demo/scenarios.tsx
